scripts.android:run:release: export ANDROID_HOME="${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}" && export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-$ANDROID_HOME}" && export PATH="$ANDROID_HOME/emulator:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH" && expo run:android --variant release
scripts.android:sync: expo prebuild --platform android && npm run android:run
scripts.android:studio: npm run android:prebuild && open -a 'Android Studio' android
scripts.clean: rm -rf android/app/build android/build node_modules/.cache .expo dist web-build
scripts.fastlane:metadata: unset BUNDLE_GEMFILE; bundle exec fastlane metadata
scripts.screenshots: npx playwright install chromium && node docs/scripts/capture-screenshots.js
scripts.screenshots:upload: npm run screenshots && npm run fastlane:metadata
